title: Arm AGI CPU explained..
summary: Arm announced their first AGI CPU targeting agentic workloads, entering a competitive and capital-intensive semiconductor market. Hyperscalers increasingly customize CPUs for their specific data center needs, raising time-to-market risks and supply chain complexity.
